text.title: Bug Pattern to Lint Rule Conversion Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the decision-record artefact. A record that does not validate cannot be merged into `decisions/`.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "bplrc-print-in-prod", "pattern_id": "no-print-statements", "ticket_refs": ["BUG-101", "BUG-114", "BUG-129", "BUG-141"], "detector": {"kind": "ruff", "definition": "select=T201", "rule_id": "T201"}, "fix": "Replace print() with logger.info() / logger.debug() — see docs/logging.md", "owner_email": "ruslan@faion.net", "fp_rate_pct": 1.3, "wired_into_pre_commit": true, "verdict": "record-and-wire", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

{ "artefact_id": "lint", "pattern_id": "X", "ticket_refs": ["BUG-101"], "detector": {"kind": "checklist", "definition": "ask the reviewer to look for print()"}, "fix": "be careful", "owner_email": "team@", "fp_rate_pct": 18, "verdict": "record-and-wire", "version": "1.0", "last_reviewed": "today" }
example.note: artefact_id missing bplrc- prefix; only 1 ticket_ref (violates r1, needs ≥3); detector.kind="checklist" — not in enum (violates r2, no mechanical detector); owner is a team alias (violates r3); fp_rate_pct=18 above 5% gate (violates r4); version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.reason: r2 requires a mechanical detector; human checklists are not enforced.
r4 ceiling violation; high FP rate kills adoption.
r1 threshold violation; conversion overhead wasted below recurrence.
